34230844.title: 2002 NACAC Under-25 Championships in Athletics
34230844.extract: The 2nd NACAC Under-25 Championships in Athletics were held in San Antonio, Texas, United States on August 9–11, 2002.   As in 2000 the event was open for athletes younger than 25 years.  A detailed report on the results was given.  However, the results were affected by doping (see below).
